R0229.title: Invisible Vulnerability Impact from Missing SBOM
R0229.definition: The organization cannot quickly determine whether newly disclosed vulnerabilities affect its products or supplier deliveries.
keywords: Invisible Vulnerability Impact from Missing SBOM
R0229.description: The organization cannot quickly determine whether newly disclosed vulnerabilities affect its products or supplier deliveries.
R0229.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
